hero.tagline: Your golf course in perfect condition
hero.description: Smart technology to keep the turf, fleet and club operations under total control.

stats.description: OrlegiTech uses artificial intelligence, aerial analysis, and real-time control to help golf courses maintain optimal turf conditions and manage their resources more efficiently.

demo.title: Book your demo
demo.description: Book your demo to learn more about OrlegiTech and how we can help you improve the performance of your golf course.

features.4: Everything from your mobile or tablet.

features.1: Get NDVI, NDRE maps and turf status in minutes.
features.2: Detect water stress, weak areas and real maintenance needs.

features.3: Safety and efficiency on the course

appService.title: Your club, fully digitized.
appService.description1: OrlegiTech centralizes all golf course management in a single application. From task planning and staff control to project tracking, check-ins, budgets and phytosanitary reports.
appService.description2: The maintenance team works in a coordinated way with real-time information, automatic alerts and an AI assistant that helps the greenkeeper make data-driven decisions.
appService.description3: Everything accessible from your mobile or tablet, anytime and from anywhere on the course.

intelligentIrrigation.title: Do more with every drop.
intelligentIrrigation.description1: Smart optimization of electricity consumption. OrlegiTech reduces the course's electricity costs by intelligently controlling the SCADA, irrigation systems, moisture sensors, electricity prices and real-time weather.
intelligentIrrigation.description2: The system decides when, where and how much to irrigate based on energy costs, actual turf needs and weather forecasts, avoiding unnecessary irrigation and consumption during expensive hours.
intelligentIrrigation.description3: As a result, you'll get less electricity consumption, less water usage and the same or better course condition.

aerialReportsService.title: Your turf under control.
aerialReportsService.description1: Aerial analysis for turf health. We use drones and multispectral cameras to generate indices, detect water stress, pests and deficiencies, and deliver automated reports with recommendations.
aerialReportsService.description2: We measure outdoor productivity with AI-automated reports based on times, tasks and incident prioritization.

description.2: At OrlegiTech we combine agronomy, artificial intelligence and aerial analysis to improve the performance of each course. Our goal is to help you keep the turf in optimal condition, reduce operating costs and facilitate daily staff planning.
description.3: We work with greenkeepers, club directors and maintenance teams to transform complex data into clear decisions. Our system adapts to each course according to budget, category, climate and available resources.

aerialReports.title: Aerial reports
aerialReports.description: Multispectral maps of vigor, stress and turf density.

assistantIA.title: AI Assistant
assistantIA.description: Virtual Greenkeeper Assistant: the intelligent memory of the course.

vehicleFleet.title: Vehicle fleet
vehicleFleet.description: GPS control of buggies, machinery and operational routes.

irrigationPlanning.title: Irrigation planning
irrigationPlanning.description: Optimize water and time with automatic recommendations.

operatorManagement.title: Organizational and Employee Management
operatorManagement.description: Roles, schedules, work reports and productivity.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.description: Real maintenance costs of the course in a single panel.

userCheckIn.title: User check-in
userCheckIn.description: Digital time control integrated with the club app.

planning.title: Planning
planning.description: Smart planning for greenkeepers and course staff.

drone.name: Aerial reports module with multispectral drone and AI

whatYouGet.title: What you'll get from the demo
whatYouGet.subtitle: Our demos are designed to show you how OrlegiTech can transform your course management.
whatYouGet.personalizedDesc: Demo tailored to your course, challenges and use cases (irrigation, drone, fleet, staff).
whatYouGet.expertDesc: Session with an expert who knows the golf industry and greenkeeper needs.
whatYouGet.liveDemoDesc: OrlegiTech in action with real data and scenarios relevant to your operations.
whatYouGet.roiDesc: Potential savings and efficiency improvements for your facility.
whatYouGet.roadmapDesc: Clear next steps and timeline to get started with OrlegiTech.
whatYouGet.supportDesc: Training, integration and implementation with our team.

process.title: Simple 3-step process
process.step1Desc: Provide your details and your course's specific needs.
process.step2Desc: We contact you within 24 hours to schedule your demo.
process.step3Desc: Join your demonstration and see OrlegiTech in action.

faq.title: Demo FAQ
faq.a1: The standard demo is 30-45 minutes online, and 1-2 hours for on-site visits. We adjust the length to your needs.
faq.a2: Yes. Our demos are free and with no commitment. We want you to see the value of OrlegiTech before deciding.
faq.q3: Can several team members join the demo?
faq.a3: Absolutely. The more perspectives (greenkeeper, management, maintenance), the better we can tailor the demo.
faq.q4: What if I'm not ready to sign up after the demo?
faq.a4: No pressure. We're here to support you through the entire decision process.
faq.q5: Can you show me features specific to my course?
faq.a5: Yes. We focus on irrigation, aerial reports, fleet, planning, or whatever matters most to you.
